title: Kizaru Lands on Egghead
description: On pages 3–5, this part focuses on Saturn, Sentomaru, Bonney, York, Unknown person #4, Kizaru as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Sentomaru
dialogue.text: Good, the pacifistas are on our side!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey!! What's wrong with you guys?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: IF IT'S JUST ONE, IT DOESN'T MATTER!! I CAN RIDE ANYTHING!!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: NAVY HEAD- QUARTERS, Vice Admiral Bluegrass

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The "Stick-stick fruit" makes me a skilled driver!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I kill you, will the curse on our Marines be lifted?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Bring back their ages you manipu- Lated!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 17 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
